extraction.one_line_summary: HERMANS Ben attacked inside final kilometer on uphill finish, overpowering KUDUS Merhawi's earlier move and COSTA Rui's sprint.
tactical_patterns: NORMAN LETH Lasse's 5km solo from white jersey position failed; peloton held cohesion until final 2km uphill.
Dimension Data mistimed KUDUS Merhawi's pounce; BMC waited for sight-of-line power surge on gradient finish.
Breakaway of CHRISTIAN Mark and VAN HECKE Preben collapsed on penultimate climb, revealing peloton's climb-control threshold at Al Hamriya.

rider_signals.HERMANS Ben: positive: demonstrated superior finishing power on uphill finale, reading race perfectly to time final-meter attack
rider_signals.KUDUS Merhawi: neutral: showed ambition with late attack but lacked finishing punch when gradient steepened near line
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: positive: held second place in uphill sprint finish, confirming climbing form early season
rider_signals.NORMAN LETH Lasse: negative: white jersey holder's 5km solo attempt absorbed easily, suggesting insufficient power reserve for sustained efforts
rider_signals.CHRISTIAN Mark: negative: folded on penultimate climb after 62km breakaway, indicating endurance ceiling in heat conditions
